name: Carmelized Onion and Parmesan Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onions, garlic cloves, and bay leaves to the pot. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Sauté the onion mixture until the onions are caramelized, about 7 minutes.
4. Stir in the chicken stock, minced garlic, basil, and thyme. Bring the liquid to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 40 minutes.
6. Add the diced French bread and heavy cream. Whisk continuously until the bread has dissolved into the soup for about 10 minutes.
7. With a handheld blender, puree the soup until smooth.
8. Stir in the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and chopped parsley. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
